rationales.164f7d3d63d5cc85828794aec88f9836: Explores advanced mechanistic insights into B cell depletion therapies across various autoimmune diseases, including MS.
rationales.1a6420577881a2020d502068c6e79515: Provides advanced molecular insights into clonally expanded B cells in MS, linking them to Epstein-Barr virus and GlialCAM.
rationales.53ef3e54a182f121080c54f6f5d63787: Reviews the evolving understanding of B cell roles in MS pathogenesis and the concept of targeted B-cell depletion.
rationales.8f74f55a5ffdbf102e55a123fa031090: Highlights B cells as key disease drivers and therapeutic targets, referencing early rituximab trials.
rationales.96be9990629de69cbf217e0d0d3a083f: Delves into the molecular mechanism by which BTK inhibition modulates B-cell–T-cell interaction, offering deeper therapeutic understanding.
rationales.ab642b9255f962f00084042f2154bb2b: Reveals the pathological significance of meningeal B-cell follicles in progressive MS, linking B cells to severe cortical pathology.
rationales.b46b6752eb8b2e6783c6d009553915f0: Introduces Bruton’s Tyrosine Kinase (BTK) inhibition as a promising next-generation B-cell targeted therapy for MS.
rationales.b5e4140f626ba592e0f8040b9e63f18c: Marks the significant impact and establishment of B-cell therapy as a crucial treatment option for MS.
rationales.c218df1f3b002d3bbe29f57a38e5003b: Presents pivotal phase 2 trial data demonstrating the efficacy and safety of ocrelizumab in relapsing-remitting MS.
rationales.c64b243a85cfddaecd548fbccfea7f49: Provides a comprehensive overview of anti-CD20 therapies, covering their pathological basis and clinical application in MS.
rationales.e2f8a0d10254bee7300aaa1726630eab: Discusses practical considerations for using rituximab, an anti-CD20 agent, in the specific context of pediatric MS.
rationales.e6c7440544642a0a1a31ebdf5bc7e577: Focuses on ocrelizumab and other CD20+ B-cell depleting therapies, including their efficacy in primary progressive MS.

rationales.0dbb5d2a3d85d5e2ae182b598ef6863c: This narrative review highlights bladder and bowel dysfunction as significant 'invisible symptoms' within a comprehensive approach to MS management.
rationales.36b6f797c345c00e237754d333659aed: This consensus paper offers essential guidance on the assessment and management of bladder symptoms in MS, crucial for clinical practice.
rationales.4b507897543694afd32a767f85057185: This review provides a foundational understanding of neurogenic bowel dysfunction, covering its prevalence, impact on quality of life, and management strategies in MS.
rationales.9c4fe72f3611a0b20da3dee38f56cd67: This paper delves into the patient perspective, examining treatment satisfaction and the bothersome nature of bladder and bowel symptoms, offering a deeper insight into QoL impact.

rationales.1f099a26257999c215216ade9be0c56e: This study details the specific role of PECAM-1 in stabilizing BBB integrity and facilitating T-cell diapedesis during neuroinflammation.
rationales.44870152065b2135ec133bba0de70180: This review provides a comprehensive overview of BBB dysfunction in MS, covering its causes, consequences, and therapeutic implications.
rationales.4521f7b1ab1d3b8887c461351ab075ad: This research identifies MCAM as a key adhesion molecule promoting the recruitment of encephalitogenic T lymphocytes across the BBB.
rationales.9e3e323bea2186699e497d7861581b81: This review explores advanced strategies, such as engineered nanoparticles, for precision drug delivery across the BBB to treat CNS disorders.
rationales.be8ee73d7234208eb47d6eb2fd8b8677: This paper explains the fundamental mechanisms by which immune cells breach the BBB to enter the brain in MS.
rationales.fc0d8c9249ff5851ee5b4a5028bdf9e1: This paper establishes neurofilament levels as a biomarker associated with BBB integrity and lymphocyte extravasation in early MS.

rationales.3cda6446e9a295feed1dab470ec3f2ca: Explains the multifaceted role of microglia in MS, highlighting why they are a key target for CNS-penetrant BTK inhibitors.
rationales.44870152065b2135ec133bba0de70180: Explains blood-brain barrier dysfunction in MS, underscoring the importance of CNS-penetrant therapies like BTK inhibitors.
rationales.6054b7a4501e736e10cd63667cbcd1cc: Presents phase 2b clinical trial data for tolebrutinib, demonstrating its efficacy and safety in relapsing MS.
rationales.69454965c1bbf0799f3e2fc82178c664: Reports on a placebo-controlled trial of evobrutinib, offering specific clinical outcomes for another BTK inhibitor.
rationales.6ab243ce87f009bef30c91d659f804bc: Provides a comprehensive overview of Bruton's tyrosine kinase inhibitors and their therapeutic potential in multiple sclerosis.
rationales.96be9990629de69cbf217e0d0d3a083f: Delves into the specific molecular mechanisms by which BTK inhibition modulates B-cell and T-cell interactions.
rationales.9db9dd82b4dae30a54a43921da47423d: Investigates specific microglial pathways, like MAPKERK overactivity, that BTK inhibitors might target in MS.
rationales.abd2317d673f30595736f38dbd7665f1: Explores how activated microglia contribute to demyelination via CSF1R signaling, a pathway potentially modulated by BTK inhibitors.
rationales.b46b6752eb8b2e6783c6d009553915f0: Offers a detailed review of BTK inhibition, providing a deeper synthesis of the therapeutic landscape and challenges.
rationales.e6e2d51c408ba03d91f083e7d88944e5: Discusses the mechanisms driving progressive MS, providing context for BTK inhibitors targeting 'smoldering' disease.
rationales.eeacec868b4511093739cb3b1d64953a: Establishes the critical role of B cells in MS pathogenesis, a primary target for BTK inhibitors.

rationales.0dbb5d2a3d85d5e2ae182b598ef6863c: This review positions cognitive impairments as a key 'invisible symptom' within a comprehensive approach to MS management.
rationales.213dcd047c81784a185b5b8550fc8199: This paper delves into structural MRI correlates, using advanced methods to link specific brain damage to cognitive deficits in MS.
rationales.21fc977feae2d034b603cb7733ebd6c5: This research explores the neuropathology of hippocampal dysfunction and a potential therapeutic intervention for memory impairment in MS.
rationales.248eb043211fd51a413f554d51f4502c: This study investigates the correlation between cognitive dysfunction and neurofilament light polypeptide levels, a specific biomarker, in MS.
rationales.5c6eb5958ea2fb8239eab3372fbcdf33: This paper offers practical recommendations for cognitive screening and management, addressing assessment tools and strategies.
rationales.602de8ec1be83948ae88f76db94194c3: This review focuses on the specific effects of menopause on cognitive symptoms in women with multiple sclerosis.
rationales.87b7474219a5662a93cf3d81d0ff23f9: This foundational paper details the prevalence and specific patterns of cognitive dysfunction observed in multiple sclerosis.
rationales.ae690b0463b086e974631afe383e7c3d: This paper examines how race and ethnicity influence cognitive function in newly diagnosed MS patients, highlighting demographic disparities.
rationales.aea9088c9f22b9300d18dab5d5730027: This paper provides a comprehensive overview of cognitive impairment in MS, covering clinical management, MRI, and therapeutic avenues.
rationales.c3459bbaa673a053c01b67c303aaa154: This paper provides specialized insights into cognitive and psychosocial features specifically in childhood and juvenile MS.
rationales.df8167e4fdc5afa715e53bdaec4325d2: This study explores the crucial link between cognitive deficits and their impact on everyday functional activities in MS patients.

rationales.29a5e523cb04dd327a6e5a9c6a22d025: This study establishes neurofilament light chain and oligoclonal bands as prognostic biomarkers in early stages of multiple sclerosis.
rationales.850b028db28632cccad53606cff867c0: This paper examines the relationship between CSF neurofilament light chain levels and cognitive impairment in multiple sclerosis patients.
rationales.96751ecdaa29c743fd2017ef1166dcc1: This paper introduces kappa free light chains and oligoclonal bands as interchangeable CSF biomarkers in the 2024 McDonald diagnostic criteria.
rationales.9b280fde6874792c004e6b847bdaf1f6: This critical review provides a foundational understanding of blood neurofilament light chain as a biomarker for neuronal injury.
rationales.a6904749e51b185ab55ca5084eb1cc55: This paper highlights the role of NfL and glial fibrillary acidic protein (GFAP) in differentiating MS disease courses.
rationales.c036b8ea79fdc6cab8dda54892c64621: This research demonstrates serum neurofilament light chain as a predictor of disease worsening and brain/spinal cord atrophy in multiple sclerosis.
rationales.d03770c799886673a34c90cef87c8e0a: This study investigates the combined prognostic potential of CSF neurofilament light chain and chitinase-3 like-1 in multiple sclerosis.
rationales.eb5a5bdc2622a6dbc7e8a235fd3b0965: This paper focuses on the utility of serum neurofilament light chain as a biomarker specifically in progressive multiple sclerosis.

rationales.13564bdb5febb0b1d38b77676aeba9fd: This comprehensive review offers an updated overview of MS pathology, including molecular aspects, demyelination in white and gray matter, and neurodegeneration.
rationales.14ad1ba5291f6c3657c596cc02558ae7: This paper proposes a unifying histological classification system for MS lesions, essential for understanding the diverse pathological manifestations.
rationales.2202f12a53491be9581e74f27eb55741: This paper establishes the critical link between neurodegeneration, specifically axonal loss, and permanent neurological disability in MS.
rationales.3b559471b6d4c5b6fda99a35ae786419: This paper explores the neural androgen receptor as a specific therapeutic target for promoting myelin repair in chronic demyelination.
rationales.5aae6d9b9b5d6478eb293ec5f1c7d594: This review provides a foundational understanding of remyelination biology in the CNS and its potential for therapeutic intervention.
rationales.6149d4340638dc5e38691c640de64d42: This study provides insights into the occurrence and extent of remyelination specifically within cortical lesions in chronic MS patients.
rationales.7541612a7ea49f1aa731f605c7158ffa: This study identifies inefficient myelin debris clearance by microglia as a specific mechanism impairing remyelination processes.
rationales.ac493a2b3c0e1da06953d27942d421ff: This early study was crucial in establishing the presence and significance of acute axonal damage in MS lesions.
rationales.ae2b051d13e046a36e209c2b3d3073bc: This study investigates regional differences in remyelination failure, particularly in periventricular areas, and its contribution to neurodegeneration.
rationales.b93bbc430aa624c3a24885ab119a1bd5: This paper introduces the concept of a reversible form of axon damage, adding nuance to the understanding of axonal pathology in MS.
rationales.bcca4f261a35e09dcc89122f5a3c7991: This paper provides a foundational understanding of MS pathology, defining inflammatory demyelination and associated axonal damage.
rationales.d38a701103dc736dc27650680dd6ed33: This paper provides in situ evidence for specific immunological mechanisms, namely antibody- and complement-mediated demyelination, in MS.
rationales.d4b9e04dc5a8d39c6a9b2b8173049841: This recent review synthesizes the pathogenesis of chronic demyelination and axonal degeneration, highlighting their therapeutic implications.
rationales.daa928e91ffdb9a2b096b43eac907503: This recent paper focuses on 'smouldering lesions' and the specific cellular and pathobiochemical mechanisms driving chronic demyelination and neurodegeneration.
rationales.ffdc650801631b8452f2f3cb7e113810: This paper delves into the complex balance between demyelination and remyelination in the context of progressive multiple sclerosis.

rationales.08caccad9a0ca229a22f4550b3dc20a7: Offers an updated overview of the high prevalence and impact of neuropsychiatric symptoms, including depression, in MS.
rationales.0dbb5d2a3d85d5e2ae182b598ef6863c: Integrates mood disorders into the broader context of 'invisible symptoms' for comprehensive MS management.
rationales.10b44f5497cbc0174a5d1ccda9b0e013: Presents emerging evidence on depressive symptoms, anxiety, and cognitive impairment, providing a current foundational understanding.
rationales.182655ec2515f4deb31a2f736a6c672a: Explores the gut microbiota-brain axis as a specific biological mechanism contributing to neurological and psychiatric disorders.
rationales.2def680bfb7f4123cf2964bf2d5faf20: Focuses on the specialized context of perinatal depression and anxiety in women with MS.
rationales.602de8ec1be83948ae88f76db94194c3: Reviews the impact of menopause on women with MS, including its influence on mood disturbances.
rationales.669ba1b5949d8ddb24ebc16a6d1b015d: Delivers evidence-based guidelines for the assessment and management of psychiatric disorders in MS.
rationales.7f8057f754bc25f4e383921a82b15354: Investigates the strong relationship between cognitive impairment and nonsomatic symptoms of depression in MS.
rationales.836eed21167b7034dca4476ac7aeca63: Provides deeper insights into the inflammatory and neuroglial aspects of MS pathogenesis relevant to mood disorder mechanisms.
rationales.d228cc19cf0229460184cf29966dc067: Details the mechanisms of neuronal dysfunction and degeneration in MS, offering a biological basis for neuropsychiatric symptoms.
rationales.ee043c45f5376a26956aa4650e6e0be2: Provides an early comprehensive review of depression prevalence and its relationship with MS.

rationales.047a3285ade63589276df8c2ce31e345: This study clarifies how disability is acquired in MS, distinguishing between relapse-associated worsening and progression independent of relapse activity.
rationales.1b84ccb0d4cf9a3c36fe1fe3f93b1064: This review offers a comprehensive overview of secondary progressive MS, detailing its characteristics and differences from relapsing-remitting MS.
rationales.2aad391cd41041d0c680cb0eef1522d0: This systematic review provides an essential overview of MS relapse epidemiology, outcomes, and management.
rationales.38d65ed7107ec8b5091630cf4be49d20: This paper investigates the crucial relationship between relapses and long-term disability progression in MS.
rationales.3be219c79ed6acd2d1696e3bbda3da2f: This paper introduces the widely accepted phenotypic classification of MS disease courses.
rationales.582f23682211d97c40cacbcc87c3f2bb: This review provides insights into the complex epigenetic mechanisms that contribute to MS disease progression.
rationales.6f322777da26a96e70c125f02d2e0eff: This review delves into the current understanding and future challenges regarding the secondary progressive phase of MS.
rationales.753ba5e0dffbc730f4ff23d495623e9d: This natural history study provides key observations on the clinical features and evolution of the progressive phase of MS.
rationales.813237f9ab450891b35a34b8032c9b3d: This paper discusses the standard clinical outcome measures, including EDSS, used to assess MS disease progression in trials.
rationales.836e3bf429a210dcbde1d50e143d5b94: This study provides specific evidence for relapse-independent progression in MS patients under long-term treatment, deepening understanding of PIRA.
rationales.891e0143fe813d9a76c3c27065d412a5: This foundational paper presents a unifying concept for the variable patterns of MS evolution and disability accumulation.
rationales.a62e6867fd8fd089666cf7bd38d78f49: This recent paper discusses emerging epidemiological trends and evolving definitions that redefine the clinical course of MS.
rationales.b756978d42c57cf588ecd13f75a1e4b6: This observational study investigates the critical impact of early high-efficacy therapy on reducing long-term disability in MS.
rationales.f5cb7f0de8b18a6be79e9cd440b94b3a: This paper explores the use of serum neurofilament light chain as a biomarker for individual prognostication of MS disease activity.
rationales.f9f2ed6dc044e99d40d42063c98de5d3: This paper proposes a topographical model that integrates the dynamic interplay of relapses and progression in MS disease course.
rationales.ffdc650801631b8452f2f3cb7e113810: This study examines the pathological balance between demyelination and remyelination as a key factor in progressive MS.

rationales.047a3285ade63589276df8c2ce31e345: It provides a deeper understanding of how disability accumulates in MS (RAW vs PIRA) and the effectiveness of therapies in delaying this process.
rationales.19205a4ee145885de5c9d60d65040a45: This review outlines the progress, new lessons learned, and remaining challenges in clinical trials for progressive multiple sclerosis.
rationales.24cbe6ff99bcce90651711eeb6449fba: This paper presents a roadmap towards precision medicine in MS, aiming to tailor treatments to individual patient profiles.
rationales.37e44e24c83cfcbcb63c9211904fde32: This paper provides a comprehensive overview of current and emerging DMTs and treatment strategies in MS.
rationales.40c6aa431603781e610fc5fe8dde3a25: It discusses remyelination therapies as a new and exciting direction for promoting repair and regeneration in multiple sclerosis.
rationales.4eafb27d793a22ee7d874172a61f5aa1: This review offers a foundational understanding of MS pathogenesis and the early landscape of disease-modifying agents.
rationales.5b8d7453124ad4527894c2bf0b1f0687: This consensus statement advocates for early and unrestricted access to high-efficacy DMTs to optimize long-term benefits for MS patients.
rationales.6ab243ce87f009bef30c91d659f804bc: This paper explores Bruton tyrosine kinase inhibitors as an emerging therapeutic mechanism, particularly for targeting CNS immunopathology.
rationales.7bb9dc37873ffa2e91d8bc18377c12c6: It presents international consensus recommendations for improving MS management, emphasizing the importance of early intervention for brain health.
rationales.92d58c9a84372afaad9777a4390ed4cf: This paper examines the various outcome measures used in clinical trials for MS, which are crucial for assessing DMT efficacy.
rationales.b35653a40f5dee84247cf9a471c4493c: It focuses on advances in oral immunomodulating therapies, highlighting their diverse modes of action and convenience.
rationales.c661d94bf04f95e30c989a2928c1fd1d: This paper directly addresses the critical debate between early highly effective versus escalation treatment approaches in MS.
rationales.e301a2244218a4c99ba9bd4e58008856: It details the multitude of DMT options, their mechanisms of action, and the role of high-efficacy therapies for treatment-naïve RRMS.
rationales.e6e2d51c408ba03d91f083e7d88944e5: It discusses mechanism-based criteria to improve therapeutic outcomes specifically in the challenging context of progressive multiple sclerosis.
rationales.f5cb7f0de8b18a6be79e9cd440b94b3a: It focuses on serum neurofilament light chain as a biomarker for individual prognostication of disease activity and treatment response.

rationales.08b736a81bbcebdccc0b17c33bbc093b: Delves into the molecular pathophysiology of EBV in MS and discusses methods for in vivo imaging of its effects.
rationales.1a6420577881a2020d502068c6e79515: Offers direct evidence for molecular mimicry, showing how EBV proteins can trigger autoreactive B cell responses in MS.
rationales.2d5e7c2469c2831f2dba43c878d51c98: Explores how EBV infection interacts with genetic and other environmental factors to increase MS risk.
rationales.76d721c70acb143d14abc71c389bfbb6: Discusses the evolution of research from establishing an association to investigating specific mechanisms of EBV in MS.
rationales.8fc051aee0708f1a71834a9ba78d18bc: Outlines broader opportunities for prevention and therapeutic interventions based on the understanding of EBV's role in MS.
rationales.8fea31c9665a41051222994c9a4e1bac: Focuses on the specific potential of EBV vaccines as a strategy for preventing multiple sclerosis.
rationales.a1dd62c23bbcbc33afc0f5caaee0fb9e: Presents compelling epidemiological and mechanistic evidence for EBV's causal role in multiple sclerosis.
rationales.e016f8b969e198802e798c5b87379fa0: Provides a comprehensive overview of epidemiological evidence and proposed mechanisms linking EBV to MS.

rationales.08b736a81bbcebdccc0b17c33bbc093b: Delves into the molecular pathophysiology and imaging aspects of Epstein-Barr virus's role in MS, offering a deeper understanding.
rationales.1bd77682a43725371cf903c3a6e5e086: Examines the rising incidence of MS in women, suggesting complex sex-based and environmental interactions.
rationales.2b31bec83ae7e825b93027a8460c3550: Provides an updated epidemiological perspective on genetic and environmental factors, including vitamin D, obesity, and infections.
rationales.40a4d6921945ddccedfe5db83952927d: A recent review (2021) summarizing key environmental factors and introducing gene-environment interactions.
rationales.6d8511824acdb4d016410b6f880a6f95: Focuses specifically on non-infectious environmental factors, including diet and behaviors, complementing infectious factor discussions.
rationales.94a5401cbe9b50e5fd1cc92c67e7282b: Provides a comprehensive umbrella review of environmental risk factors, summarizing evidence quality.
rationales.b54381d3b6f0da22af4cab19d65e5fb4: Discusses the strength of evidence for EBV, vitamin D, smoking, and migration as causal factors.
rationales.ba032dd490406d7cc30b8997156b1389: Further explores sex-specific environmental interactions and their influence on MS risk across the lifespan in women.
rationales.ca4ee3c12af2d85872592b930194b948: Systematically reviews modifiable risk factors like vitamin D and smoking specifically in the context of MS progression, not just onset.
rationales.cd29e813a01ae351213cd04d665b538b: Offers a foundational overview of established environmental risk factors like vitamin D, smoking, and EBV.
rationales.dcaa8d412e524f57ad70149a2d2f744c: Analyzes MS mortality trends by race/ethnicity, age, and sex, providing a more specific epidemiological outcome related to environmental and social factors.
rationales.e2e2095e60a993f88584f7bb6cb2575d: A very recent (2022) review covering complex interactions between genetic, environmental, and lifestyle factors affecting MS risk.
rationales.e6d83866bed881b97c822fc80b71415c: Highlights the strong evidence from migration studies and geographical distribution for environmental influence on MS risk.
rationales.e8805cba8751e2897f427b6b4dde49c8: Investigates MS incidence across diverse racial and ethnic groups, exploring potential links to vitamin D levels and environmental disparities.

rationales.06378984db2a72517ac5a0301d8a6c35: Identifies pervasive global barriers to early MS diagnosis, including resource limitations and lack of accessible education.
rationales.136e6c4da0c13ea236c366fb34541dc0: Discusses health equity challenges and recommendations in the context of wearable devices and digital health.
rationales.23b31e5ae980f7e08a8dab671ff0eb66: Provides a comprehensive overview of health disparities, inequities, and social determinants of health in MS in the US.
rationales.3302a596efe511690f98a2a9d0dcee6d: Examines the differential association of sun exposure and vitamin D with MS risk across Black, Hispanic, and White populations.
rationales.4d110195d3d5a270332afc6890c82433: Highlights that people with MS from underrepresented minority and immigrant groups experience higher comorbidity burdens.
rationales.5b8d7453124ad4527894c2bf0b1f0687: Advocates for early and unrestricted access to high-efficacy DMTs, highlighting systemic barriers like reimbursement restrictions.
rationales.69437280a3e25e1eedbf6975c8ea512d: Provides an earlier epidemiological perspective on differences in MS prevalence and phenotypes between Caucasians and Latino Americans.
rationales.94453b7cf5e2600787d77a2b649b7eb2: Addresses the historical underdiagnosis and undertreatment of MS in African Americans, advocating for improved care and outcomes.
rationales.aed83c9bd9b7103cf7b7c22bb51b4ee7: Offers population-based prevalence estimates of MS in the US, disaggregated by race, ethnicity, and geographic region.
rationales.dfdb25ae484eaab3b3a2553224cd9cbb: Demonstrates how health insurance coverage, a key socioeconomic factor, impacts access to disease-modifying therapies in MS.
rationales.e3f8c9201d1d341c5fb6f4bc041e9a8b: Investigates the influence of individual and neighborhood-level social determinants of health on disparate disability accumulation across diverse MS patient cohorts.
rationales.ea75402200858c1cfb4915ca6f3a1a0d: Examines health disparities in MS specifically among Hispanic and Black populations, highlighting the role of social determinants of health.
rationales.eb6000ed7d2ff59b413a1cf6c5b27075: Demonstrates a direct association between socioeconomic disparity and accelerated retinal neurodegeneration in multiple sclerosis.

rationales.08caccad9a0ca229a22f4550b3dc20a7: This review examines fatigue within the broader spectrum of neuropsychiatric symptoms in MS, aiding in differential diagnosis and holistic care.
rationales.0dbb5d2a3d85d5e2ae182b598ef6863c: This review contextualizes fatigue as a prevalent 'invisible symptom' in MS and discusses its comprehensive management alongside other symptoms.
rationales.1d745f5a6158839375124de9b91bf4f5: It offers a specific treatment algorithm and recommendations for tailored therapeutic strategies to manage MS-related fatigue.
rationales.59b434a47382fbb022e713eb8a4480b9: This paper delves into the specific mechanisms of altered energy metabolism in oligodendrocytes and myelin, which can contribute to MS fatigue.
rationales.602de8ec1be83948ae88f76db94194c3: It discusses how menopause can influence and overlap with MS symptoms, including fatigue, in women with MS.
rationales.730f37ee5280dd8a2485d8573094c34b: It introduces a key patient-reported outcome measure (MSIS-29) for assessing the impact of MS symptoms, including fatigue, on quality of life.
rationales.73217a0acca5463cc45270a2be46abaf: This paper provides a comprehensive overview of fatigue mechanisms, evaluation methods, and treatment strategies in MS.
rationales.7e5e80a56b9cbcbbb0464f41985afa7b: This paper explores a specific, mechanism-driven therapeutic approach (high-dose biotin) targeting demyelination and hypoxia, relevant to progressive MS fatigue.
rationales.8a66f5941e13d7c3b4770058c1ef189e: This meta-analysis provides evidence-based insights into the effectiveness of various non-pharmacological and pharmacological interventions for MS fatigue.
rationales.d228cc19cf0229460184cf29966dc067: It explores the underlying mechanisms of neuronal dysfunction and degeneration in MS, providing a deeper understanding of potential fatigue origins.

rationales.1b402784fc6580d3a67b8ec436beef0a: This classic review introduces MS as a complex trait resulting from the interplay of genetic and environmental factors.
rationales.3f6a6d17cd8921c2bb8561a7175ffd6f: This paper provides specialized insights into MS susceptibility alleles within the African American population, highlighting genetic diversity.
rationales.474cd5ca83daec4114528ad6fa2fb038: This advanced study delves into how Class II HLA interactions specifically modulate genetic risk for MS.
rationales.4fda7c4ebf1df9444efbc9911032644b: This comprehensive review provides a foundational understanding of MS immunogenetics, covering HLA and non-HLA loci.
rationales.69758ed9767f3bd58f1f4b80d6ebe630: This study offers foundational insights into the fine-mapping of HLA and non-HLA effects within the major histocompatibility complex.
rationales.82e83be64352e206bb31d18e1213f117: This study identifies novel MS susceptibility loci and introduces the advanced concept of epigenetic regulation in MS.
rationales.899e3ef18eb92a39f188776d0ac02e41: This paper demonstrates an early application of genetic risk scores for predicting MS susceptibility, showing methodological development.
rationales.998dc55354b6171ddf5c6a7a2510244d: This paper examines sex-related factors in MS susceptibility, illustrating a key gene-environment interaction.
rationales.e2e2095e60a993f88584f7bb6cb2575d: This recent review provides an updated foundational perspective on the complex genetic and environmental factors influencing MS risk.
rationales.e721790f1c77eb7abd1a72ee6b8813fa: This focused study exemplifies research into specific gene variants (TREM2) and their contribution to MS susceptibility.
rationales.e8805cba8751e2897f427b6b4dde49c8: This study investigates MS incidence across multiple racial and ethnic groups, providing advanced epidemiological context for genetic differences.
rationales.e9e155dece4aba0cf17bcf2bd9ea6b1f: This paper explores the advanced concept of polygenic risk scores and their association with MS susceptibility and phenotype.
rationales.ffc9f0f13c6422bcc49ccdba548ce5b7: This paper establishes the fundamental role of genetic risk and immune mechanisms in MS pathogenesis.

rationales.1403a7ec27e0a811cbe6c1622e22b143: This paper offers a general overview of MS as a multifactorial, immune-mediated disease influenced by genetic and environmental factors.
rationales.1b402784fc6580d3a67b8ec436beef0a: This foundational paper introduces MS as a prototype inflammatory autoimmune disorder of the central nervous system.
rationales.4647e94d43b6056c2ec584a858b03319: This paper delves into the specific trafficking and clonal relationships of B cells between the central nervous system and periphery.
rationales.53ef3e54a182f121080c54f6f5d63787: This paper provides a deeper understanding of B cell contributions to CNS autoimmunity and their therapeutic targeting in MS.
